scripts.test:visual: npm run build && (npm run preview -- --host 127.0.0.1 > /tmp/recode-preview.log 2>&1 & PREVIEW_PID=$!; sleep 3; PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4321 node tests/phase1-shell.spec.mjs; STATUS=$?; kill $PREVIEW_PID; exit $STATUS)
scripts.verify: npm run check && npm run build && npm run verify:static && npm run test:visual
